inputs.label: standard
inputs.story: A major technology company has announced it will lay off 12,000 employees, approximately 15% of its global workforce, citing a shift toward AI-driven operations.

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.story: New report shows rental prices in the capital fell 3% in Q4 for the first time in six years.

inputs.label: european
inputs.story: The European Commission has fined a major social media platform 1.3 billion euros for violating GDPR data transfer rules, the largest privacy fine ever imposed in the EU.
